response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) work. While his experience aligns well with cloud and TypeScript/Python ecosystems, his AI/GenAI production experience is less explicitly detailed than required for a Staff-level role. His leadership in technical discovery and mentorship is evident, but deeper GenAI-specific expertise (e.g., RAG, multi-agent systems) needs validation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Python, and cloud platforms (AWS), aligning with key technologies for the role.
Proven leadership in technical discovery, mentorship, and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., re:cinq, Altom Consulting).
Recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) and open-source projects demonstrate adaptability to GenAI workflows.
concerns: AI/GenAI production experience is not explicitly quantified (e.g., 8+ years of AI-driven solutions), raising questions about depth in RAG/vector databases.
Lacks advanced degrees (Master’s/PhD) or clear expertise in LLM optimization metrics, a preferred qualification.
Diverse background (embedded, mobile, web) may dilute focus on enterprise GenAI/cloud infrastructure delivery.
